text.title: Error Handling in VUI Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces.

example.code: { "intents": [ "play-music", "set-timer", "weather" ], "no_input_ladder": [ "Are you still there?", "I'm listening \u2014 say `play music` or `set a timer` when you're ready.", "Tap the screen if you need help, or I'll bring up the menu." ], "misrecognition_ladder": [ "Sorry, I didn't catch that.", "You can say things like `play jazz` or `set a 5 minute timer`. What would you like?", "Let me show you the options on screen." ], "escalation_channel": "visual" }

example.note: Empty intents; missing no_input + misrecognition ladders; no escalation_channel.

list.item: A ladder with the same string repeated across rungs.
Rung 3 as a third voice re-ask.
